case_title: BLISS, SUSAN H. VS MCCORMACK, BRUCE M.D., INC.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCORMACK, BRUCE M.D., INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY BLISS, SUSAN H. AS TO DEFENDANT MCCORMACK, BRUCE M.D., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLISS, SUSAN H. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCCORMACK, BRUCE M.D., INC. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE DISCLOSURE AND THE INFORMATION ENCLOSED DO NOT CONSTITUTE A VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE 56.10 OR RELATED STATUTES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
